Introduction

This Copilot Readiness Report provides an executive overview of your organization’s preparedness to adopt and successfully leverage Microsoft 365 Copilot. As Copilot introduces powerful AI-driven capabilities across your Microsoft 365 environment, ensuring the right technical, security, and user adoption foundations are in place is critical to achieving meaningful business outcomes.

The purpose of this report is to assess your current environment against key readiness criteria, including licensing, security posture, application usage, and collaboration patterns. These factors directly influence both the effectiveness of Copilot and the return on investment from its deployment.

The insights and recommendations outlined in this report are designed to help leadership and IT stakeholders clearly understand current readiness levels, identify potential risks or gaps, and prioritize next steps.

By addressing these areas, your organization can approach Copilot deployment with confidence, maximizing productivity gains while maintaining strong governance and security controls.

This report serves as a strategic guide to support a structured, secure, and value-driven rollout of Microsoft 365 Copilot across your organization.
